# Zachary Vorsteg

> Zachary Vorsteg is an AI systems architect and automation engineer based in West Palm Beach, FL (available nationwide). He builds AI-powered automation, agentic workflows, LLM integrations, and custom software that eliminate manual work for growing companies. Founder of CustomLab.ai, with a portfolio of shipped products across AI SaaS, CRM, and ad management (including Trusenda and AdsHandled — see Ventures). He is also a full-stack developer, an M&A/FP&A financial analyst (FAU '20 Finance), and a Florida-licensed commercial real estate sales associate (SL3603483, Cornerstone Realty).

## Services

- [AI Automation](https://zacharyvorsteg.com/ai-automation): AI-powered automation, agentic workflows, LLM integration, and business process automation. First automation typically live in ~2 weeks.
- [Custom Software](https://zacharyvorsteg.com/custom-software): Custom CRMs, client portals, native iOS apps, and web applications when off-the-shelf tools don't fit. Fixed-price, typically 2-4 week delivery.
- [Strategic Finance](https://zacharyvorsteg.com/finance): M&A synergy modeling, automated FP&A systems, 3-statement models, and investor-ready pro formas.
- [Commercial Real Estate](https://zacharyvorsteg.com/commercial-real-estate): Industrial, warehouse, and flex space in Palm Beach County. Tenant representation (free to tenants).

## Ventures

- [CustomLab.ai](https://customlab.ai): AI operations automation for service businesses.
- [Trusenda](https://trusenda.com): CRM for industrial/commercial real estate brokers (iOS + web).
- [Ads Handled](https://adshandled.com): Done-for-you Facebook & Google ads management.
- [Palm Beach Warehouses](https://palmbeachwarehouses.com): Warehouse & industrial space, Palm Beach County.
- [Palm Beach Homes Realty](https://palmbeachhomesrealty.com): Luxury homes & equestrian estates, Wellington/Palm Beach.
- [Palm Beach Websites](https://palmbeachwebsites.com): Web development for local businesses.
